    21→
    22→def _normalize(text):
    23→    """Remove punctuation for comparison."""
    24→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)
    25→
    26→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):
    27→    """Return True if a and b differ only in punctuation (same chars after removing punct)."""
    28→    return _normalize(a) == _normalize(b)
    29→
    30→def _segment(text):
    31→    """Jieba word segmentation, filter empty tokens."""
    32→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    33→
    34→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):
    35→    """Map a word position in doc_words back to paragraph index."""
    36→    # Build char offset for each word
    37→    char_offset = 0
    38→    for i, w in enumerate(doc_words):
    39→        if i == word_pos:
    40→            break
    41→        char_offset += len(w)
    42→    # Find which paragraph this char offset falls in
    43→    running = 0
    44→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    45→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    46→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    47→            return idx
    48→        running += plen
    49→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
    50→
    51→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
    52→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""
    53→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    54→    confidence_threshold = config.get('confidence_threshold', 0.0)
    55→

    57→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
    58→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
    59→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    60→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    61→
    62→    # Build char->timestamp mapping from word_timestamps
    63→    ts_map = {}  # audio char offset -> {start, end, confidence}
    64→    if word_timestamps:
    65→        offset = 0
    66→        for wt in word_timestamps:

    68→            for i in range(len(w)):

    70→            offset += len(w)

   102→            if _punct_only_diff(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):

   161→def _call_claude(prompt, api_key, model):
   162→    r = requests.post('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', timeout=60,
   163→        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-api-key': api_key, 'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01'},

   165→    data = r.json()
   166→    return data.get('content', [{}])[0].get('text', '')
   167→
   168→def _call_openai_compat(prompt, api_key, endpoint, model):
   169→    r = requests.post(endpoint, timeout=60,
   170→        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
   171→        json={'model': model, 'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': prompt}], 'temperature': 0.1})

   175→def test_llm(provider_id, api_key, model=None):

    11→class App(tk.Tk):
    12→    def __init__(self):

    22→    def _build_notebook(self):

    25→        self._build_home_tab()

    29→    # ===== Home Tab =====
    30→    def _build_home_tab(self):

    40→
    41→        bf2 = ttk.Frame(f)

    43→        ttk.Button(bf2, text='📄 选择Word文档', command=self._pick_doc).pack(side='left')
    44→        ttk.Label(bf2, textvariable=self.doc_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)
    45→
    46→        self.start_btn = ttk.Button(f, text='开始对比', command=self._start_compare)
    47→        self.start_btn.pack(pady=20)

    49→        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(f, mode='indeterminate', length=400)

    53→
    54→    def _pick_audio(self):
    55→        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择录音文件',
    56→            filetypes=[('音频文件', '*.wav *.mp3 *.m4a *.flac *.ogg *.wma *.aac'), ('所有文件', '*.*')])
    57→        if p: self.audio_path.set(p)

    59→    def _pick_doc(self):
    60→        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择Word文档',
    61→            filetypes=[('Word文档', '*.docx'), ('所有文件', '*.*')])
    62→        if p: self.doc_path.set(p)

    64→    def _start_compare(self):
    65→        if not self.audio_path.get() or not self.doc_path.get():
    66→            messagebox.showwarning('提示', '请先选择录音和Word文档')
    67→            return
    68→        # Auto-save current settings before validating
    69→        self._collect_keys()
    70→        self.config_data['asr_provider'] = self.asr_var.get()
    71→        save_config(self.config_data)
    72→        config = self.config_data

    75→            self.nb.select(2)

    77→        self.start_btn.config(state='disabled')
    78→        self.progress.start(10)
    79→        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, args=(config,), daemon=True).start()
    80→
    81→    def _do_compare(self, config):
    82→        try:
    83→            def cb(msg): self.status_var.set(msg)
    84→
    85→            cb(f'正在转写录音 ({ASR_PROVIDERS[config["asr_provider"]]["name"]})...')
    86→            word_timestamps = None
    87→            try:
    88→                audio_text, word_timestamps = transcribe_with_timestamps(self.audio_path.get(), config, cb)
    89→            except Exception:
    90→                audio_text = transcribe_audio(self.audio_path.get(), config, cb)
    91→
    92→            cb('正在解析文档...')
    93→            paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path.get())
    94→            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
    95→
    96→            cb('正在逐字对比内容...')
    97→            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=word_timestamps)
    98→
    99→            cb('正在生成对比文档...')
   100→            output_path = generate_diff_docx(self.doc_path.get(), result.get('diffs', []), summary=result.get('summary'))
   101→            html_path = generate_html_report(result.get('diffs', []), result.get('summary', ''), audio_text, doc_text, self.audio_path.get())
   102→
   103→            self.after(0, lambda: self._show_result(output_path, html_path, result, audio_text, doc_text))
   104→        except Exception as e:
   105→            import traceback; traceback.print_exc()
   106→            self.after(0, lambda: messagebox.showerror('处理失败', str(e)))
   107→        finally:
   108→            self.after(0, self._reset_home)

   110→    def _reset_home(self):

   115→    # ===== Result Tab =====

   145→        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='打开HTML报告', command=self._open_html).pack(side='left', padx=4)
   146→        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='打开所在文件夹', command=self._open_result_folder).pack(side='left', padx=4)
   147→        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='分享到微信', command=self._share_wechat).pack(side='left', padx=4)
   148→
   149→    def _show_result(self, output_path, html_path, result, audio_text, doc_text):
   150→        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
   151→        self.diff_count_var.set(f'发现 {len(diffs)} 处差异')
   152→        self.summary_var.set(result.get('summary', ''))
   153→        self.output_path_var.set(output_path)

   156→        self.audio_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
   157→        self.audio_text_box.insert('1.0', audio_text)
   158→        self.doc_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
   159→        self.doc_text_box.insert('1.0', doc_text)
   160→
   161→        self.nb.select(1)

   178→    def _share_wechat(self):

   180→        if not p or not os.path.exists(p):

   196→    # ===== Settings Tab =====

   205→        canvas.create_window((0, 0), window=self.settings_inner, anchor='nw')

   211→
   212→        sf = self.settings_inner

   215→        self.key_entries = {}

   217→        # ASR section

   219→        asr_f = ttk.Frame(sf)

   221→        for pid, info in ASR_PROVIDERS.items():
   222→            ttk.Radiobutton(asr_f, text=info['name'], variable=self.asr_var, value=pid,
   223→                command=self._on_asr_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)
   224→
   225→        self.asr_keys_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(sf, text='转写服务配置', padding=8)
   226→        self.asr_keys_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)

   230→
   231→    def _render_asr_keys(self):
   232→        for w in self.asr_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
   233→        pid = self.asr_var.get()
   234→        info = ASR_PROVIDERS[pid]
   235→        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
   236→
   237→        for field in info['fields']:
   238→            label_map = {'key': 'API Key / AccessKey ID', 'secret': 'Secret', 'appKey': 'AppKey', 'region': 'Region'}
   239→            ttk.Label(self.asr_keys_frame, text=label_map.get(field, field)).pack(anchor='w')
   240→            e = ttk.Entry(self.asr_keys_frame, width=50, show='*' if field in ('key','secret') else '')
   241→            e.insert(0, keys.get(field, ''))
   242→            e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
   243→            self.key_entries[f'asr_{pid}_{field}'] = e
   244→
   245→        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.asr_keys_frame)

   249→    def _on_asr_change(self):

   251→        self._render_asr_keys()

   253→    def _collect_keys(self):
   254→        """Collect current key entries into config_data before switching provider."""
   255→        for k, e in list(self.key_entries.items()):
   256→            try:
   257→                val = e.get()
   258→            except:
   259→                continue
   260→            parts = k.split('_', 2)  # e.g. asr_aliyun_key
   261→            if parts[0] == 'asr':
   262→                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
   263→                self.config_data.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
   264→        self.key_entries.clear()
   265→
   266→    def _test_asr(self):
   267→        self._collect_keys()
   268→        pid = self.asr_var.get()
   269→        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
   270→        ok, msg = test_asr(pid, keys)
   271→        messagebox.showinfo('成功' if ok else '失败', msg)
   272→
   273→    def _save_settings(self):

   275→        self.config_data['asr_provider'] = self.asr_var.get()
   276→        save_config(self.config_data)
   277→        messagebox.showinfo('成功', '设置已保存')

    11→def _same_pinyin(a, b):

break 43→ start = pos + 1 44→ located.sort(key=lambda x: x[0]) 45→ 46→ parts = [] 47→ cursor = 0 48→ for start, end, d in located: 49→ dtype = d.get('type', 'mismatch') 50→ at = html.escape(d.get('audioText', '')) 51→ ts = _fmt(d.get('time_start')) 52→ uncertain = ' uncertain' if d.get('uncertain') else '' 53→ ts_attr = f' data-time="{d["time_start"]}"' if d.get('time_start') SRC = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
PY_FILES = ['main.py', 'config.py', 'compare.py', 'transcribe.py', 'docx_util.py', 'html_report.py']
DIST_NAME = '录音文档对比'
HIDDEN = ['jieba', 'docx', 'requests', 'audioop', 'jiwer', 'pypinyin']
OBF_DIR = os.path.join(SRC, 'dist_obf')


def run(cmd, **kw):
    print(f'> {" ".join(cmd)}')
    r = subprocess.run(cmd, **kw)
    return r.returncode == 0


def ensure_pyarmor():
    try:

    except ImportError:

def package():

    cmd = [

        '--onefile', '--windowed',
        '--name', DIST_NAME,
        '--paths', OBF_DIR,
    ]

        cmd += ['--hidden-import', h]
    # Add pyarmor runtime if present
    rt = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, 'pyarmor_runtime_000000')
    if not os.path.isdir(rt):
        # Find any pyarmor_runtime* dir
        for d in os.listdir(OBF_DIR):
            if d.startswith('pyarmor_runtime'):
                rt = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, d)
                break
    if os.path.isdir(rt):
        cmd += ['--add-data', f'{rt};{os.path.basename(rt)}']
    cmd.append(obf_main)
    return run(cmd, cwd=SRC)


def cleanup():
    for d in [OBF_DIR, os.path.join(SRC, 'build'), os.path.join(SRC, '__pycache__')]:
        if os.path.isdir(d):
            shutil.rmtree(d, ignore_errors=True)
    spec = os.path.join(SRC, f'{DIST_NAME}.spec')
    if os.path.isfile(spec):
        os.remove(spec)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    ensure_pyarmor()
    if not obfuscate():
        sys.exit('Obfuscation failed')
    if not package():
        sys.exit('Packaging failed')
    cleanup()
    print(f'Done: dist/{DIST_NAME}.exe')

SRC = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
PY_FILES = ['main.py', 'config.py', 'compare.py', 'transcribe.py', 'docx_util.py', 'html_report.py']
DIST_NAME = '录音文档对比'
HIDDEN = ['jieba', 'docx', 'requests', 'audioop', 'jiwer', 'pypinyin']
OBF_DIR = os.path.join(SRC, 'dist_obf')


def run(cmd, **kw):
    print(f'> {" ".join(cmd)}')
    r = subprocess.run(cmd, **kw)
    return r.returncode == 0


def ensure_pyarmor():
    try:
        import pyarmor
    except ImportError:
        run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', 'pyarmor'])


def obfuscate():
    files = [os.path.join(SRC, f) for f in PY_FILES]
    # Try highest protection first
    if run(['pyarmor', 'gen', '--enable-jit', '--enable-themida', '--enable-bcc',
            '--private', '--restrict', '-O', OBF_DIR] + files, cwd=SRC):
        return True
    print('Advanced obfuscation unavailable, falling back to basic...')
    return run(['pyarmor', 'gen', '-O', OBF_DIR] + files, cwd=SRC)


def package():
    obf_main = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, 'main.py')
    cmd = [
        sys.executable, '-m', 'PyInstaller',
        '--onefile', '--windowed',
        '--name', DIST_NAME,
        '--paths', OBF_DIR,
    ]
    for h in HIDDEN:
        cmd += ['--hidden-import', h]
    # Add pyarmor runtime if present
    rt = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, 'pyarmor_runtime_000000')
    if not os.path.isdir(rt):
        # Find any pyarmor_runtime* dir
        for d in os.listdir(OBF_DIR):
            if d.startswith('pyarmor_runtime'):
                rt = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, d)
                break
    if os.path.isdir(rt):
        cmd += ['--add-data', f'{rt};{os.path.basename(rt)}']
    cmd.append(obf_main)
    return run(cmd, cwd=SRC)


def cleanup():
    for d in [OBF_DIR, os.path.join(SRC, 'build'), os.path.join(SRC, '__pycache__')]:
        if os.path.isdir(d):
            shutil.rmtree(d, ignore_errors=True)
    spec = os.path.join(SRC, f'{DIST_NAME}.spec')
    if os.path.isfile(spec):
        os.remove(spec)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    ensure_pyarmor()
    if not obfuscate():
        sys.exit('Obfuscation failed')
    if not package():
        sys.exit('Packaging failed')
    cleanup()
    print(f'Done: dist/{DIST_NAME}.exe')

SRC = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
PY_FILES = ['main.py', 'config.py', 'compare.py', 'transcribe.py', 'docx_util.py', 'html_report.py']
DIST_NAME = '录音文档对比'
HIDDEN = ['jieba', 'docx', 'requests', 'audioop', 'jiwer', 'pypinyin']
OBF_DIR = os.path.join(SRC, 'dist_obf')


def run(cmd, **kw):
    print(f'> {" ".join(cmd)}')
    r = subprocess.run(cmd, **kw)
    return r.returncode == 0


def ensure_pyarmor():
    try:
        import pyarmor
    except ImportError:
        run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', 'pyarmor'])


def obfuscate():
    files = [os.path.join(SRC, f) for f in PY_FILES]
    # Try highest protection first
    if run(['pyarmor', 'gen', '--enable-jit', '--enable-themida', '--enable-bcc',
            '--private', '--restrict', '-O', OBF_DIR] + files, cwd=SRC):
        return True
    print('Advanced obfuscation unavailable, falling back to basic...')
    return run(['pyarmor', 'gen', '-O', OBF_DIR] + files, cwd=SRC)


def package():
    obf_main = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, 'main.py')
    cmd = [
        sys.executable, '-m', 'PyInstaller',
        '--onefile', '--windowed',
        '--name', DIST_NAME,
        '--paths', OBF_DIR,
    ]
    for h in HIDDEN:
        cmd += ['--hidden-import', h]
    # Add pyarmor runtime if present
    rt = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, 'pyarmor_runtime_000000')
    if not os.path.isdir(rt):
        # Find any pyarmor_runtime* dir
        for d in os.listdir(OBF_DIR):
            if d.startswith('pyarmor_runtime'):
                rt = os.path.join(OBF_DIR, d)
                break
    if os.path.isdir(rt):
        cmd += ['--add-data', f'{rt};{os.path.basename(rt)}']
    cmd.append(obf_main)
    return run(cmd, cwd=SRC)


def cleanup():
    for d in [OBF_DIR, os.path.join(SRC, 'build'), os.path.join(SRC, '__pycache__')]:
        if os.path.isdir(d):
            shutil.rmtree(d, ignore_errors=True)
    spec = os.path.join(SRC, f'{DIST_NAME}.spec')
    if os.path.isfile(spec):
        os.remove(spec)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    ensure_pyarmor()
    if not obfuscate():
        sys.exit('Obfuscation failed')
    if not package():
        sys.exit('Packaging failed')
    cleanup()
    print(f'Done: dist/{DIST_NAME}.exe')

     7→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶',
     8→                '那个', '就是', '就是说', '然后', '对吧', '对的', '这个',
     9→                '那', '所以', '但是', '不过', '其实', '反正', '好的'}

    11→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    12→    """Return True if two strings have identical pinyin with tones."""
    13→    if not a or not b or len(a) != len(b):
    14→        return False
    15→    pa = pinyin(a, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    16→    pb = pinyin(b, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    17→    return pa == pb
    18→
    19→def _is_punct(ch):
    20→    return bool(re.match(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', ch))
    21→
    22→def _normalize(text):
    23→    """Remove punctuation for comparison."""
    24→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)
    25→
    26→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):
    27→    """Return True if a and b differ only in punctuation (same chars after removing punct)."""
    28→    return _normalize(a) == _normalize(b)
    29→
    30→def _segment(text):
    31→    """Jieba word segmentation, filter empty tokens."""
    32→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    33→
    34→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):
    35→    """Map a word position in doc_words back to paragraph index."""
    36→    # Build char offset for each word
    37→    char_offset = 0
    38→    for i, w in enumerate(doc_words):
    39→        if i == word_pos:
    40→            break
    41→        char_offset += len(w)
    42→    # Find which paragraph this char offset falls in
    43→    running = 0
    44→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    45→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    46→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    47→            return idx
    48→        running += plen
    49→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
    50→
    51→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
    52→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""
    53→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    54→    confidence_threshold = config.get('confidence_threshold', 0.0)
    55→
    56→    # Normalize and segment
    57→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
    58→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
    59→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    60→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    61→
    62→    # Build char->timestamp mapping from word_timestamps
    63→    ts_map = {}  # audio char offset -> {start, end, confidence}
    64→    if word_timestamps:
    65→        offset = 0
    66→        for wt in word_timestamps:
    67→            w = _normalize(wt['word'])
    68→            for i in range(len(w)):
    69→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
    70→            offset += len(w)
    71→
    72→    # Diff
    73→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    74→    raw_diffs = []
    75→
    76→    # Track audio char offset per audio_words position
    77→    audio_char_offsets = []
    78→    off = 0
    79→    for w in audio_words:
    80→        audio_char_offsets.append(off)
    81→        off += len(w)
    82→
    83→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    84→        if tag == 'equal':
    85→            continue
    86→
    87→        doc_fragment = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    88→        audio_fragment = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    89→
    90→        # Skip filler words
    91→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    92→            continue
    93→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    94→            continue
    95→        if tag == 'replace':
    96→            if doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    97→                continue
    98→            # Same pinyin+tone = same pronunciation, not a real diff
    99→            if _same_pinyin(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   100→                continue
   101→            # Punctuation-only difference (same text, different punctuation) = not a diff
   102→            if _punct_only_diff(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   103→                continue
   104→
   105→        # Skip single punctuation or whitespace-only diffs
   106→        if not doc_fragment.strip() and not audio_fragment.strip():
   107→            continue
   108→
   109→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_norm, i1, doc_words)
   110→
   111→        # Get timestamp and confidence for this diff
   112→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   113→        confidence = 1.0
   114→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   115→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   116→            if char_off in ts_map:
   117→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   118→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   119→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   120→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   121→                if end_off in ts_map:
   122→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   123→
   124→        diff_entry = {
   125→            'docText': doc_fragment,
   126→            'audioText': audio_fragment,
   127→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   128→            'position': pos,
   129→            'confidence': confidence,
   130→            'uncertain': confidence < confidence_threshold if confidence_threshold > 0 else False,
   131→        }
   132→        if ts_start is not None:
   133→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   134→        if ts_end is not None:
   135→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   136→
   137→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   138→
   139→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   140→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   141→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   142→
   143→    # WER/CER metrics
   144→    doc_str = ' '.join(doc_words)

   146→    wer_val = wer(doc_str, audio_str) if doc_str else 0

   150→
   151→    summary = (f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n'
   152→               f'词准确率 {accuracy_word:.1f}% | 字准确率 {accuracy_char:.1f}%')
   153→
   154→    return {
   155→        'diffs': raw_diffs, 'summary': summary,
   156→        'wer': wer_val, 'cer': cer_val,
   157→        'accuracy_word': accuracy_word, 'accuracy_char': accuracy_char,
   158→    }

   160→# --- LLM calls kept for test_llm ---
   161→def _call_claude(prompt, api_key, model):

    11→class App(tk.Tk):
    12→    def __init__(self):
    13→        super().__init__()
    14→        self.title('录音文档对比')
    15→        self.geometry('700x600')
    16→        self.configure(bg='#f5f5f5')
    17→        self.audio_path = tk.StringVar()
    18→        self.doc_path = tk.StringVar()
    19→        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value='就绪')
    20→        self._build_notebook()
    21→
    22→    def _build_notebook(self):
    23→        self.nb = ttk.Notebook(self)
    24→        self.nb.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=8, pady=8)
    25→        self._build_home_tab()
    26→        self._build_result_tab()
    27→        self._build_settings_tab()
    28→
    29→    # ===== Home Tab =====
    30→    def _build_home_tab(self):
    31→        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=20)
    32→        self.nb.add(f, text='  首页  ')
    33→
    34→        ttk.Label(f, text='选择文件', font=('', 16, 'bold')).pack(pady=(0,16))
    35→
    36→        bf1 = ttk.Frame(f)
    37→        bf1.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
    38→        ttk.Button(bf1, text='🎤 选择录音文件', command=self._pick_audio).pack(side='left')
    39→        ttk.Label(bf1, textvariable=self.audio_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)
    40→
    41→        bf2 = ttk.Frame(f)
    42→        bf2.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
    43→        ttk.Button(bf2, text='📄 选择Word文档', command=self._pick_doc).pack(side='left')
    44→        ttk.Label(bf2, textvariable=self.doc_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)
    45→
    46→        self.start_btn = ttk.Button(f, text='开始对比', command=self._start_compare)
    47→        self.start_btn.pack(pady=20)
    48→
    49→        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(f, mode='indeterminate', length=400)
    50→        self.progress.pack(pady=4)
    51→
    52→        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.status_var, foreground='#666').pack(pady=4)
    53→
    54→    def _pick_audio(self):
    55→        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择录音文件',
    56→            filetypes=[('音频文件', '*.wav *.mp3 *.m4a *.flac *.ogg *.wma *.aac'), ('所有文件', '*.*')])
    57→        if p: self.audio_path.set(p)
    58→
    59→    def _pick_doc(self):
    60→        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择Word文档',

    62→        if p: self.doc_path.set(p)

    64→    def _start_compare(self):
    65→        if not self.audio_path.get() or not self.doc_path.get():
    66→            messagebox.showwarning('提示', '请先选择录音和Word文档')
    67→            return
    68→        # Auto-save current settings before validating
    69→        self._collect_keys()

    74→            messagebox.showwarning('提示', '请先在设置中配置API密钥')
    75→            self.nb.select(2)
    76→            return
    77→        self.start_btn.config(state='disabled')
    78→        self.progress.start(10)
    79→        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, args=(config,), daemon=True).start()

    81→    def _do_compare(self, config):

    83→            def cb(msg): self.status_var.set(msg)
    84→

   255→        for k, e in list(self.key_entries.items()):

    12→    """Return True if two strings have identical pinyin with tones."""
    13→    if not a or not b or len(a) != len(b):
    14→        return False
    15→    pa = pinyin(a, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    16→    pb = pinyin(b, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    17→    return pa == pb
    18→
    19→def _is_punct(ch):
    20→    return bool(re.match(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', ch))
    21→
    22→def _normalize(text):
    23→    """Remove punctuation for comparison."""
    24→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)
    25→
    26→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):
    27→    """Return True if a and b differ only in punctuation (same chars after removing punct)."""
    28→    return _normalize(a) == _normalize(b)
    29→
    30→def _segment(text):
    31→    """Jieba word segmentation, filter empty tokens."""
    32→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]

    34→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):
    35→    """Map a word position in doc_words back to paragraph index."""
    36→    # Build char offset for each word
    37→    char_offset = 0
    38→    for i, w in enumerate(doc_words):
    39→        if i == word_pos:
    40→            break
    41→        char_offset += len(w)
    42→    # Find which paragraph this char offset falls in
    43→    running = 0
    44→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    45→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    46→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    47→            return idx
    48→        running += plen
    49→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1

    51→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
    52→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""
    53→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    54→    confidence_threshold = config.get('confidence_threshold', 0.0)
    55→
    56→    # Normalize and segment
    57→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
    58→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
    59→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    60→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    61→
    62→    # Build char->timestamp mapping from word_timestamps
    63→    ts_map = {}  # audio char offset -> {start, end, confidence}
    64→    if word_timestamps:
    65→        offset = 0
    66→        for wt in word_timestamps:
    67→            w = _normalize(wt['word'])
    68→            for i in range(len(w)):
    69→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
    70→            offset += len(w)
    71→
    72→    # Diff
    73→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    74→    raw_diffs = []
    75→
    76→    # Track audio char offset per audio_words position
    77→    audio_char_offsets = []
    78→    off = 0
    79→    for w in audio_words:
    80→        audio_char_offsets.append(off)
    81→        off += len(w)
    82→
    83→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    84→        if tag == 'equal':
    85→            continue
    86→
    87→        doc_fragment = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    88→        audio_fragment = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    89→
    90→        # Skip filler words
    91→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    92→            continue
    93→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    94→            continue
    95→        if tag == 'replace':
    96→            if doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    97→                continue
    98→            # Same pinyin+tone = same pronunciation, not a real diff
    99→            if _same_pinyin(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   100→                continue
   101→            # Punctuation-only difference (same text, different punctuation) = not a diff
   102→            if _punct_only_diff(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   103→                continue
   104→
   105→        # Skip single punctuation or whitespace-only diffs
   106→        if not doc_fragment.strip() and not audio_fragment.strip():
   107→            continue
   108→
   109→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_norm, i1, doc_words)
   110→
   111→        # Get timestamp and confidence for this diff
   112→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   113→        confidence = 1.0
   114→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   115→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   116→            if char_off in ts_map:
   117→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   118→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   119→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   120→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   121→                if end_off in ts_map:
   122→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   123→
   124→        diff_entry = {
   125→            'docText': doc_fragment,
   126→            'audioText': audio_fragment,
   127→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   128→            'position': pos,
   129→            'confidence': confidence,
   130→            'uncertain': confidence < confidence_threshold if confidence_threshold > 0 else False,
   131→        }
   132→        if ts_start is not None:
   133→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   134→        if ts_end is not None:
   135→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   136→
   137→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   138→
   139→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   140→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   141→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   142→
   143→    # WER/CER metrics
   144→    doc_str = ' '.join(doc_words)
   145→    audio_str = ' '.join(audio_words)
   146→    wer_val = wer(doc_str, audio_str) if doc_str else 0
   147→    cer_val = cer(doc_norm, audio_norm) if doc_norm else 0
   148→    accuracy_word = max(0, (1 - wer_val) * 100)
   149→    accuracy_char = max(0, (1 - cer_val) * 100)
   150→
   151→    summary = (f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n'
   152→               f'词准确率 {accuracy_word:.1f}% | 字准确率 {accuracy_char:.1f}%')
   153→
   154→    return {
   155→        'diffs': raw_diffs, 'summary': summary,
   156→        'wer': wer_val, 'cer': cer_val,
   157→        'accuracy_word': accuracy_word, 'accuracy_char': accuracy_char,
   158→    }

   162→    r = requests.post('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', timeout=60,

   168→def _call_openai_compat(prompt, api_key, endpoint, model):

   172→    data = r.json()

    11→def _same_pinyin(a, b):

    19→def _is_punct(ch):

    21→
    22→def _normalize(text):

    24→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)

    26→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):
    27→    """Return True if a and b differ only in punctuation (same chars after removing punct)."""

    30→def _segment(text):

    32→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    33→
    34→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):
    35→    """Map a word position in doc_words back to paragraph index."""
    36→    # Build char offset for each word
    37→    char_offset = 0
    38→    for i, w in enumerate(doc_words):
    39→        if i == word_pos:
    40→            break
    41→        char_offset += len(w)
    42→    # Find which paragraph this char offset falls in
    43→    running = 0
    44→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    45→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    46→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    47→            return idx
    48→        running += plen
    49→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1

    51→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
    52→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""
    53→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]

    55→

    58→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
    59→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    60→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    61→
    62→    # Build char->timestamp mapping from word_timestamps
    63→    ts_map = {}  # audio char offset -> {start, end, confidence}

    68→            for i in range(len(w)):

    70→            offset += len(w)

    98→            # Same pinyin+tone = same pronunciation, not a real diff

   120→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]

   123→
   124→        diff_entry = {

   127→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   128→            'position': pos,
   129→            'confidence': confidence,

   131→        }
   132→        if ts_start is not None:

   136→
   137→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   138→
   139→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   140→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')

    11→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    12→    """Return True if two strings have identical pinyin with tones."""

    15→    pa = pinyin(a, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)

    19→def _is_punct(ch):

    21→
    22→def _normalize(text):

    24→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)

    26→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):

    28→    return _normalize(a) == _normalize(b)

    30→def _segment(text):

    32→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]

    34→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):

    44→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):

    46→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    47→            return idx
    48→        running += plen
    49→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1

    51→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
    52→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""

   123→
   124→        diff_entry = {

   128→            'position': pos,

   131→        }
   132→        if ts_start is not None:

   137→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   138→
   139→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   140→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   141→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')

   154→    return {

     7→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶',
     8→                '那个', '就是', '就是说', '然后', '对吧', '对的', '这个',
     9→                '那', '所以', '但是', '不过', '其实', '反正', '好的'}

    11→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    12→    """Return True if two strings have identical pinyin with tones."""
    13→    if not a or not b or len(a) != len(b):
    14→        return False
    15→    pa = pinyin(a, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    16→    pb = pinyin(b, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    17→    return pa == pb
    18→
    19→def _is_punct(ch):
    20→    return bool(re.match(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', ch))
    21→
    22→def _normalize(text):
    23→    """Remove punctuation for comparison."""
    24→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)
    25→
    26→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):
    27→    """Return True if a and b differ only in punctuation (same chars after removing punct)."""
    28→    return _normalize(a) == _normalize(b)
    29→
    30→def _segment(text):
    31→    """Jieba word segmentation, filter empty tokens."""
    32→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    33→
    34→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):
    35→    """Map a word position in doc_words back to paragraph index."""
    36→    # Build char offset for each word
    37→    char_offset = 0
    38→    for i, w in enumerate(doc_words):
    39→        if i == word_pos:
    40→            break
    41→        char_offset += len(w)
    42→    # Find which paragraph this char offset falls in
    43→    running = 0
    44→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    45→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    46→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    47→            return idx
    48→        running += plen
    49→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
    50→
    51→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
    52→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""
    53→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    54→    confidence_threshold = config.get('confidence_threshold', 0.0)
    55→
    56→    # Normalize and segment
    57→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
    58→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
    59→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    60→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    61→
    62→    # Build char->timestamp mapping from word_timestamps
    63→    ts_map = {}  # audio char offset -> {start, end, confidence}
    64→    if word_timestamps:
    65→        offset = 0
    66→        for wt in word_timestamps:
    67→            w = _normalize(wt['word'])
    68→            for i in range(len(w)):
    69→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
    70→            offset += len(w)
    71→
    72→    # Diff
    73→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    74→    raw_diffs = []
    75→
    76→    # Track audio char offset per audio_words position
    77→    audio_char_offsets = []
    78→    off = 0

    81→        off += len(w)
    82→
    83→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    84→        if tag == 'equal':

    86→
    87→        doc_fragment = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    88→        audio_fragment = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    89→
    90→        # Skip filler words
    91→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    92→            continue
    93→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    94→            continue
    95→        if tag == 'replace':
    96→            if doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
    97→                continue
    98→            # Same pinyin+tone = same pronunciation, not a real diff
    99→            if _same_pinyin(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   100→                continue
   101→            # Punctuation-only difference (same text, different punctuation) = not a diff
   102→            if _punct_only_diff(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   103→                continue
   104→
   105→        # Skip single punctuation or whitespace-only diffs
   106→        if not doc_fragment.strip() and not audio_fragment.strip():
   107→            continue
   108→
   109→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_norm, i1, doc_words)
   110→
   111→        # Get timestamp and confidence for this diff
   112→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   113→        confidence = 1.0
   114→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   115→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   116→            if char_off in ts_map:
   117→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   118→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   119→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   120→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   121→                if end_off in ts_map:
   122→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   123→
   124→        diff_entry = {
   125→            'docText': doc_fragment,
   126→            'audioText': audio_fragment,
   127→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   128→            'position': pos,
   129→            'confidence': confidence,
   130→            'uncertain': confidence < confidence_threshold if confidence_threshold > 0 else False,
   131→        }
   132→        if ts_start is not None:
   133→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   134→        if ts_end is not None:
   135→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   136→
   137→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   138→
   139→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   140→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   141→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   142→
   143→    # WER/CER metrics
   144→    doc_str = ' '.join(doc_words)

   150→
   151→    summary = (f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n'
   152→               f'词准确率 {accuracy_word:.1f}% | 字准确率 {accuracy_char:.1f}%')
   153→
   154→    return {

   158→    }

    11→class App(tk.Tk):
    12→    def __init__(self):

    14→        self.title('录音文档对比')

    22→    def _build_notebook(self):

    24→        self.nb.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=8, pady=8)
    25→        self._build_home_tab()
    26→        self._build_result_tab()

    28→
    29→    # ===== Home Tab =====

    33→
    34→        ttk.Label(f, text='选择文件', font=('', 16, 'bold')).pack(pady=(0,16))
    35→

    37→        bf1.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
    38→        ttk.Button(bf1, text='🎤 选择录音文件', command=self._pick_audio).pack(side='left')
    39→        ttk.Label(bf1, textvariable=self.audio_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)
    40→
    41→        bf2 = ttk.Frame(f)
    42→        bf2.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
    43→        ttk.Button(bf2, text='📄 选择Word文档', command=self._pick_doc).pack(side='left')
    44→        ttk.Label(bf2, textvariable=self.doc_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)
    45→
    46→        self.start_btn = ttk.Button(f, text='开始对比', command=self._start_compare)
    47→        self.start_btn.pack(pady=20)

    49→        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(f, mode='indeterminate', length=400)

    53→
    54→    def _pick_audio(self):
    55→        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择录音文件',
    56→            filetypes=[('音频文件', '*.wav *.mp3 *.m4a *.flac *.ogg *.wma *.aac'), ('所有文件', '*.*')])
    57→        if p: self.audio_path.set(p)
